## Meeting Purpose

[Deep-dive on Fieldguide's product, market position, and value proposition.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Problem:** Firms use a fragmented tech stack (e.g., Thomson Reuters, Shirlink) for audit/advisory, creating risk, inefficiency, and high costs.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [**The Solution:** Fieldguide is an end-to-end platform with embedded "professional-grade agents" that automate manual work, freeing practitioners for high-value judgment.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [**The Differentiator:** Domain-expert AI built by practitioners for practitioners, trained on 27,500 engagements. This contrasts with rigid legacy tech and generic AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [**The Outcome:** Increased capacity and higher quality work, enabling firms to grow revenue without adding headcount (e.g., one customer projected nearly $1M in incremental revenue).](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Fragmented Tech Stacks & Industry Pressures

  - [The industry relies on outdated legacy tech (e.g., Thomson Reuters, Caseware) supplemented by siloed point solutions (e.g., Shirlink for portals, DataSnipper for evidence).](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [This creates a fragmented tech stack with significant drawbacks:](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [**Risk:** Introduces errors and data loss.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Cost:** High maintenance and vendor management.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Inefficiency:** Slows down workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [**Industry Pressures Driving Change:**](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
      - [**Market:** Increasing financial complexity (e.g., digital assets) and regulatory pressure.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
      - [**Talent:** A talent shortage and declining CPA exam participation.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
      - [**Competition:** Firms must differentiate on service quality, as price margins are tight.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
      - [**Client Expectations:** Clients demand fast, transparent, and non-disruptive engagements.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### The Solution: End-to-End Platform with Domain-Expert AI

  - [Fieldguide consolidates the entire engagement workflow into one platform, eliminating the need for multiple tools.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [It features embedded "professional-grade agents" built with deep domain expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To provide credible, reliable automation that contrasts with generic "chatbots" or "copilots."](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [**Training Data:** The AI is trained on a corpus of 27,500 audit engagements, giving it a deep understanding of best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [**The "Human-First" Philosophy:** The goal is to amplify human judgment, not replace it.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
      - [**Analogy:** An "Iron Man suit" for auditors, automating repetitive tasks so practitioners can focus on high-value analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)

### Key Differentiators & "Wow" Features

  - [**Domain-Expert AI:** The most important differentiator. The agents "know what good looks like" and can flag issues like missing data before it reaches the team.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [**Flexibility & Speed:** Unlike rigid legacy tech, Fieldguide adapts to a firm's specific methodologies, enabling them to grow and innovate faster.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [**Customer Collaboration:** Customers feel they have a direct influence on the product roadmap, fostering a strong partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [**"Wow" Feature: The Testing Agent:**](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2173.0)
      - [Automates the most time-consuming part of an engagement—evidence testing—which can take weeks manually.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)
      - [**Process:** The agent compares data, documents results, and flags discrepancies with a single click.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)
      - [**Impact:** Frees auditors to apply their expertise to analyze results, not perform manual checks.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2219.0)

### Buyer Personas & Value Proposition

  - [**Core Buyers:**](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
      - [**Partners:** Own a book of business; motivated by growing revenue and delivering high-quality work.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [**Managing Partners & C-suite:** Oversee the entire firm; motivated by cost management, risk reduction, and simplifying the tech stack.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**Value Proposition:**](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [**Increased Capacity:** Automates manual work → teams can do more with existing headcount.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [**Higher Quality:** Domain-expert AI catches errors → improves accuracy and reduces rework.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [**Revenue Growth:** Increased capacity and quality → enables firms to win more clients.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Risk Reduction:** A single, trusted platform → eliminates data fragmentation and errors.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### Go-to-Market & Awareness Triggers

  - [**Sales Motion:** Traditionally bottom-up (practitioners), but Fieldguide is actively building a top-down motion (C-suite).](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)
  - [**Awareness Triggers:**](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)
      - [**Burning Pain:** The most common driver is the daily frustration of a fragmented tech stack.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
      - [**Strategic Mandates:** Top-down directives for AI transformation or tech stack overhauls (e.g., M\&A, legacy system sunsets).](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2633.0)
      - [**Competitive Shopping:** Firms often evaluate new tech annually to stay competitive, even without an immediate purchase plan.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
  - [**Fieldguide's AI Maturity Framework (AMF):**](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2395.0)
      - [A strategic tool to help risk-averse firms adopt AI confidently.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2395.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Addresses the high cost of failed tech implementations, which damage reputation and trust.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)
      - [**Positioning:** Differentiates Fieldguide as a trusted partner committed to customer success.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fieldguide:** Share the new sales deck (draft or final) with Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Erik:** Review relevant program briefs and persona documents in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/CRMPZUw1Yr5NAL1B9pyv_xzzsy1MybB7?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
